creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to kodcode from comment #0)

Beginning at <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/security/#one-time-passwords> (currently 14.3) …

If I understand correctly: OPIE is, or can be, a series of prompts; plural. 

So, instead, maybe: 

> The OPIE prompts provide a useful feature.

Although honestly, it's the type of sentence that I'd simply remove. 

(Like, everything in a handbook is, or should be, implicitly useful.)
